LanguageData.SD_Spear_Of_Galaxy_Zenith_Entity.label: Stellar Spear
LanguageData.SD_Spear_Of_Galaxy_Zenith_Entity.descrip: This ThingDef only records a quantity and should never be visible during normal play.
LanguageData.SD_DroneFramework_Entity.label: Stellar - drone unit
LanguageData.SD_StellarUniform.label: Stellar - formal uniform
LanguageData.SD_StellarBlackUniform.label: Stellar - corrupted formal uniform
LanguageData.SD_StellarCloak.label: Stellar - cloak
LanguageData.SD_Spear_of_SRA.label: Stellar - starlight regulator
LanguageData.SD_Spear_of_SRA.description: A replica of a weapon used by Lushivia. It serves as a spear, though the prism inside might also fetch a modest price from a trader...
LanguageData.SD_Spear_Of_Galaxy_Zenith.label: Stellar Spear
LanguageData.SD_Cruiser_Escort.label: Stellar cruiser unit (escort)
LanguageData.SD_Executor_Escort.label: Stellar executor unit (escort)
LanguageData.SD_Executor_Planet_Interdiction.label: Stellar executor unit (bombardment)
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_Cannon_Salvo_Skyfaller.labe: Stellar - Star-Arc Shatter light energy shell
A beacon designating an overwatch zone. Hostile forces entering the area will be struck by the Stellar Spear's anti-ship batteries.
LanguageData.SD_EnergyLance_Base.label: Stellar - Voidlight
LanguageData.SD_EnergyLance_Base.description: A beam of pure energy fired from the Stellar Spear, igniting every living thing in its path.
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_EnergyLance_Surveillance_Be: A beacon designating an overwatch zone. Hostile forces entering the area will be struck by the Stellar Spear's anti-ship batteries.
LanguageData.SD_EnergyLance_Surveillance.label: Stellar - Voidlight
LanguageData.SD_EnergyLance_Surveillance.description: A beam of pure energy fired from the Stellar Spear, igniting every living thing in its path.
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_Primary_Cannon_Surveillance: A beacon designating an overwatch zone. Hostile forces entering the area will be struck by the Stellar Spear's anti-ship batteries.
LanguageData.SD_Bullet_MinipulserEX.label: pulse beam
LanguageData.SD_Bullet_Laser.label: energy beam
LanguageData.SD_Bullet_Cannon.label: phase-energy bolt
LanguageData.SD_Bullet_Minipulser.label: pulse beam
